query: Create a compose.yaml for a Node API, Postgres database, and Redis cache for local development.
My docker-compose.yml starts Postgres but the app says ECONNREFUSED to localhost:5432. Help me fix the compose networking.
Convert this docker run command into a Docker Compose service with a named volume and port mapping.
Add a healthcheck and depends_on condition so my web service waits for the database to be ready in compose.yaml.
Review my compose file for unnecessary ports, missing env vars, and volume mistakes before I share it with the team.
Write a Kubernetes Deployment and Service for this container image.
Explain how Docker image layers and build cache work at a high level.
Fix this GitHub Actions workflow that builds and pushes a container image.
